summary: Comprehensive testing of canary breeding management application completed. Backend APIs 100% functional with all CRUD operations working. Frontend loads correctly with proper theme, navigation working between all pages. Zone and contact creation tested successfully. One minor modal timing issue with bird creation form.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal form fields not immediately accessible after clicking Add Bird button - timeout waiting for band-number-input selector
ui_bugs.details: Modal may need loading animation or the form fields might be slow to render

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with stats cards
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Birds, Zones, Pairs, Tasks, Calendar, Contacts)
Zone creation with 3x4 cage grid (12 cages generated)
Contact creation with all form fields
Calendar month navigation and today button
Theme compliance - Dark navy blue background (#1A2035)
Zones & Cages page cage grid layout

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major functionality working, one minor modal timing issue

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix bird creation modal timing issue - the form fields in the Add Bird modal are not immediately accessible after clicking the button. Consider adding proper loading states or investigating the modal rendering delay.
